Posts A Little About Her
Post
Cancel

A Little About Her

Posted Jul 11 2021-07-11T00:00:00+05:30 by Jeevan

I’ll share a few things about her, the first person I ever fell in love with.

As Kind as 🌧️

She couldn’t sleep when it was storming at her place, you know why?? Cuz there were animals in a shed right next to her house and that shed was kinda weak. She was so afraid as to what might happen to them if it collapses or goes off due to the storm!! By the time she slept it was already past 3AM. That’s how kind of a person she is.

Super Sensitive 🥺

One time while playing Valorant, she flipped and asked a toxic player to just die and believe me when I say this, she couldn’t get over how rude she was to that person for the rest of the game. Not sure if she’s a witch or an angel, but, somehow she always (90%) knows it when I’m upset. Well this is one of the reasons why I fell for her.

Caring as a Cure

She cares a lot about people close to her. Even when I was a total d*ck, she sent me this awesome cake on my birthday 😊. Every time she would check up on me and ask how was I doing? It used to make my day because not sure if it was pure coincidence or something, but I was at my worse exactly on the days she would would ask and believe me it’s an awesome feeling to know that someone out there is thinking about you or/and you matter to them. You should consider yourself lucky if you are one among them.

Strong 🦸🏻‍♀️

Unlike me, she ain’t afraid of facing any situation. I’m the kind of person who if gets slapped instead of putting up a fight, I’ll walk away from there but she on the other hand can curb stomp an entire army. I’m not exaggerating when I say that she is SCARY.I get threatened all the time that she’ll slap me when I meet her 😂. Jokes apart, the shit she put’s up with everyday at her home and in her life, is no less than a mental torture, atleast I would’ve given up and accepted my fate as it is, instead of fighting.

Eccentric Way of Experiencing Humans

Another one of her amazing quirk which I fell for. The way she see’s and want to experience humans is just indubitably awesome. Instead of me explaing things, I’ll just quote her this time:

Humans view people in such a plain way, bodies as just mere vessels, so shallow of us. When people are like SO MUCH more than just a face and body like so many different personalities, stories, different quirks, habits and weird beliefs like so much to them and yet we end up judging the exterior. Sad.

The above were her exact words and she means it, because I did see a pic of her ex- he looked horse sh*t 😌.

Smart af 🧠

Her smartness is just off the charts. With an IQ of 139 (mine’s 100 😛), anybody would look stoopid around her. Honestly, it’s kinda hard to hide things, she somehow figures it out that something is fishy 🐟.

A Huge Fanbase 👨‍👦‍👦

This one’s my fav. So basically during one of our conversations, I kinda asked her about the different people who had a crush on her and started counting them. Guess the number ??………. It’s a whopping 50+ 🤯🤯🤯 !!!! Among the 50 most of them were/are just plain A** holes, but still there are a few among the many who are nice. One in particular is warm and caring, obviously is also the one she is in a relationship with for 3+ years 😊.

Sweet Voice 🎶

She is the first person who would communicate with me using voice-notes and I loved it. Her voice…. has so many layers to it. Every night before she sleeps or just after she wakes up, the cuteness of her it is just on next level, I cannot say no to it, atleast not in this lifetime 😅. There are very few things I can listen to all day, among them is her speaking on any topic with the above voice, it doesn’t matter even if she is cussing, that still would sound sweet.

The Vessel She Lives In

I cannot comment on this very much as I’ve not met her even once in real life. But, from her photos, her eyes and lips are on a whole new level. There is this insta reel which I just was not able to get it out of my head!! watched it over a 150 times and yet it feels refreshing. The way she glows under the sun with her eyes wide open is S U R R E A L. Like her voice, even her beauty has got multiple layers. She is cute, pretty, hot and illegally beautiful.

That’s how awesome of a person she is, and ofc that should be obvious, after all she is MY FIRST LOVE.

I soooo muchh wanted to share her photo but then…. idk I just cannot do that. But then, if you are here that means you must be really close to me, else noone know’s this username, nor do they know about my blog. Well my next blog would be where I’ll pour down everything that’s in my head. I can’t hold it any longer.

love first-time life
